game.short_text: Explore the dungeons of Lithic, translate ancient riddles, and meet the locals. A sokoban/narrative experience.
game.title: Lithic

details.title: Lithic
details.description:
Explore mysterious caverns and decode ancient riddles with the help of the locals. A Sokoban/narrative experience.
Turn on sound!
Playtime: ~20 minutes



Furthermore, if you're having issues loading (specifically on Safari) we recommend playing using a different browser - Google Chrome if possible. Unfortunately, some Mac users may still be unable to load the game.

Created in one week for Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1, following the theme: "What's Behind the Door?"

We would not have created this without inspiration from System Erasure's amazing "Void Stranger"  - Please check it out!

game.short_text: Swap the colors on the magical doors to change what's inside!
game.title: Doorway Duality

details.title: Doorway Duality
details.description:
In this puzzle-platformer game, swap the colors of the doors to change what you'll find on the other side! Made for the 2024.1 Brackeys Game Jam.
Controls
Arrow Keys - Left/Right to move. Up to open doors.
Space - Jump
R - Restart level
M - Return to main menu
Escape - Close out of game (desktop)
Tips
Entering doors will take you to other doors with a matching color.The color above a door is its "secondary color." This color will swap with the original color of the door if you find and pull a lever. Orange buttons will also swap colors of doors, but these buttons need to be weighed down with an object to stay activated.Doors can only be entered if you're standing on solid ground or an object.You can use the push blocks to jump on and reach higher places.
Credits
The title font is "Re Do" by StrandedIgnitionender. The font was slightly modified for this game.
"at01 Pixel" font by GrafxKid
"Kenney Pixel Square" font by Kenney
"Multiple click sound effects" by jwiese
"Calm Ambient 1" music track by The Cynic Project / cynicmusic.com / pixelsphere.org

game.short_text: Use the door that opens a hole in the dimension to rescue your friends who have been sent to the back dimension!
game.title: Jygain's Door

details.title: Jygain's Door
details.description:
This game for Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1!!
Tutorial + 5stages / 5-10min.
How to play
[A][D][Left][Right] Move left and right.[X][Space] Open or close the door.[Z][W][Up] Jump.[S][Down] Get off one way floor.

If keys are stuck, please use Firefox or Game pad:)

Rules
Use the door to get your friends in the back dimension to the front and take them to the evacuation exit.
There is only one door, so close it after placing it and retrieve it.
If you hit a spike or a spiked object, you will make a mistake.
Spikes and the ground are common to both the back and front dimensions.
Trees can also be used as doors to move between dimensions. Use them to guide your friends and enemies.
Description
A dimensional storm has sent your friends to the other dimension!

Use Jygain's Door, a special door that can open a doorway into a dimension, to rescue all your friends!
Assets
Art and Audiohttps://kenney.nlFonthttps://mplusfonts.github.io/
Release Note
Ver0.9.7(2024/2/19) Fixed a bug that caused the game to advance one stage when starting the game after returning to the title.
Ver0.9.6 First version

details.title: A Brief Life
details.description:
Hello guys. 
"A Brief Life" the game was created for the Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1.
Like the name, it is a brief game with a funny narration and easy controls, mechanics. 
Mayority of object interaction are automatically done, example is with keys, you just need to get closer to the locks. 
Total gameplay is around 10 -20 min.   
Controls
Move -> WASD.
Move Camera -> Mouse.
Pick Object -> Mouse Left Click. (While holding an object)
Throw Object -> Mouse Right Click. (While holding an object)
Rotate Object -> Press "R" then move Mouse.

game.short_text: Chaotic Tower Defense Game for the Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1
game.title: Door Defense

details.title: Door Defense
details.description:
For Optimal Experience, play on a 16x9 Resolution. The web build has a couple visual bugs, but the game should still work well.
Description:
Door Defense is a top down, tower defense game where you goal is to destroy the enemy doors and break down the master door. Do you have what it takes? Or will you be Door-Feated? :)
Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1
This game was made from February 11th to February 18th for 11th Official Brackeys Game Jam! The theme was "What's Behind the Door?"
Controls
This game is entirely played with the mouse.
Left Click to Damage/UpgradeLeft Click and Drag to Move Resources
Creator Notes:
This is the first game I've made in a year or so, and my first ever Game Jam! I created this in Unity in around 6 days and used Aseprite for the pixel art. I hope you enjoy!
Credits
Music from PolarChips: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCw87OoT2P4fo4sLVAK7sASARandom sound effects jsfxr: https://sfxr.me/Apollo Color Palette: https://lospec.com/palette-list/apollo
Known Bugs:
There are a few known bugs right now that I didn't have time to fix, sorry for any inconveniences.
Enemy knockback is sus sometimesWeird resolution UI stuff when displaying textSome sound effects are just missing in my builds, not sure why
Please let me know if you find any other game-breaking bugs.

game.short_text: Lightning-paced mayhem in a top-down shootemup. Venture through the building. Ascend in power. Succumb regardless.
game.title: BUILDING 3008

details.title: BUILDING 3008
details.description:
Navigate through perilous corridors filled with relentless waves of enemies, unlocking opportunities, dangers, and upgrades alike with each new door. Survive against overwhelming odds or succumb to the relentless onslaught.
Created by Echofirefly, Kaynor, and bobhat - This was the first game jam for two of us, so we would really value any feedback you might have!
Also, feel free to show off your high scores :P
HINTS
Keep unlocking doors! Unlocks help you stay ahead of enemies, while new rooms offer escape routes. But beware being cornered...Enemies grow stronger and stronger, watch out for their attacks in the lategameUnlocking doors will heal you a little bit - Use this in times of need.Having your back to a wall is not safe - enemies spawn from walls. 
CONTROLS

Known Bugs
Scaling of boxes are off
All code, assets, audio, and art are made by us, with the following three exceptions:Door sound from PixabayMouse and keyboard tutorial icons from FreePik

game.short_text: Door opening roguelike
game.title: DOORIA

details.title: DOORIA
details.description:
DOORIA! is a rogue-like game in which you explore rooms behind doors labeled with emoji made for Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1 and that ranked #15 most fun out of almost 800 entries.
Battle bosses and a random assortment of other things that are at least sometimes hostile through room after room, searching for the keys to the final boss.

v1.2 fixes issues, gives the player better direction, adjusts difficulty, and makes small tweaks based on feedback and playtesting. No new content is added with this update.
Version v1.0 is still available for download.Source code

game.short_text: ​Travel through the unknown using the power of your computer windows
game.title: Window Crawler

details.title: Window Crawler
details.description:
Travel through the unknown using the power of your computer windows
Features
- A global leaderboard
- Many windows
- 4 different weapons
- 6 upgrades
- A combo system
- Slimes
- A banger soundtrack
- Your immediate demise
The Team
Ategon - Code, Music, Art
Vulkaara - Art
Icecubegame - Code
NnY - Code
Coeur - Music, SFX
Our Discord
If you want to get notified for our future games (or post jam releases), or hang out with us feel free to join! 
https://discord.gg/uW98Pdhrvv
Advanced Tips
- You can close windows to destroy everything in them (including yourself)
- When you try to minimize a window it instead puts it in a locked state that prevents it from dissapearing on its own. Minimizing again unlocks it
- Doing actions in a row racks up a combo multiplier. Keeping around pools of coins in locked rooms can help build up a large combo (but prevents you from getting more chance for upgrade rooms since youre blocking a room slot)
Version
- Jam version was made in the jam time
- Jam bug fix version fixes some of the major bugs that popped up

game.title: Down Town
game.short_text: a simulation game that is not what it seems

details.title: Down Town
details.description:
Disclaimer
As alsways, The WebGL build has some weird visual bugs like texture's overlapping incorrectly or lighting completly not working. This is why I recommend downloading the game. But if you really dont want to, webGL version is fine to play, just dont come complaining that the game is buggy.





Welcome to Down Town!
A simulation game that tries to be as accurate to the real world as possible and a world where everyone is F̵͎̩̲̘̎̐r̸̨̢͚̠͙̼̟͕̜͐̃̀͝ë̴̢̻̻̳̫̹́͂̐͛̀̓̈́̀̕̕͝͝ȩ̸̞̼̠̦̦͆̅̆̿̒͜
Explore the great outdoors and meet up with you friendly neighbors.
Just don't go outside of the game's limits, thats where stuff gets real weirdControls:
Action:Down Town:D̸͕̄̌̒͆̕ơ̶̛͉̙̗̪̥̬͌̐͂̋̚̚͠w̵͇̤̹͋́̓̀n̷̩̲͓̦͈̼͊̀̀́ ̷̧͔̃̈́̌̂̔̋B̴̩̠͔̀̇͗̌͛͘ë̷̺̫́͛̀̎̌̽͊͠͠l̷̡̠̟̤̟̮̳̟͍̃̇̑̈́͜͜͠ǫ̷̛̪̩͔͔̠̔̍̀͒̾́̏̚ͅw̷̡̰̪͔̙͎̪̖̞͂̉̔́̀̌̕͝WalkLeft mouse buttonW/A/S/DInteractRight mouse buttonEJumpXSpaceSmashXLeft mouse button

Credits:Camiel van IJzendoorn
Ivo van IJzendoornPixabaySketchFabVoice Pinny:Mike GroepenhoffȒ̴̮̩͌͗͂̑͗̔̃͑ų̷̧̳̬̝̲̟̖̪͔͉̹̼͉͊̅̂̋̀n̷̥̲̯̣̥͝ ̶̢̢͙̤̹͎̳͔̜͔̼̉̍͆̀̇͂̌͌̏̊́̈́̕̕ͅw̸̹̲͎̘͙̩͔͗̋̎͐̓̽̃͐͑́͗͊͌͜͝ḧ̶̢̧̫̹͉̞̰̗͎̹̜̫̼̟́̑̀̅́͒ͅį̶̧̖̘̩̪̠̤̤̼͇͒͆͌͗́̆́͝͠l̶̢̗̻̦̓̓́̃̓̾̂̓̾̀̑̌e̷̛͓̓͂̅̋̾͗ ̸̩͉̫͔̻̘̟̖̼̇̂͛̏̿͐̄̌̒͆̊̕͜ỹ̸̢̋̈̎͋̔̚̕ͅo̶̧̦̳̙̘̾̄͊͆̈́̾̈́͝͝u̵͉͋̃̍͊̀̆̎̈́̚͝͝ͅ ̵̢̡̤̘͉̞̘̥̳̟̳̯͌͋̾̎̌̿̀̏̕͜͝s̸͕̈́̌t̵̲͎͑͐͋̋̄̒̾̈́͛̆̓̇̕͠į̴̞̹͇͈̟̻̯̩̦̺̩̆͐̚̚l̷͇͈̱̙͍̰̊͒͋͌̽́́̅͋̂́͘ͅl̶̡̨̨̖̦̗̞̤̲̩̘̯̥͉̞͑͗͗̐͊̓̃́ ̴̛͕́̒̒͗̋̈́̀̑͆̀̊̍͝c̶̳̫͇̺͍̦͎̟̙̱͂̂̌͑̈̕͝͝ȃ̴̡̲̗̬̥̗̻͕̈́̂͆̄̑̇̾͑̽͝ͅͅn̷̡̧̧͙̠̯̘͖̝̼̣̪̥̩͛̏͌̒̒͌̇͗̐̃͊͝Download the zip file

game.title: Sound eScape!
game.short_text: Hear Am I? Use Sound to Figure Out Your Location!

details.title: Sound eScape!
details.description:
-----IMPORTANT------

Please download the map PDF from this page!

Level nine was not included in the original map, so I have uploaded a new map for level 9. After the game jam, I will make that map default.
Please use an external voice chat software like Discord.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Update 19/02/24: Gamebreaking bug fixed, where none of the levels loaded in the build version (they worked fine in the editor). Therefore player cannot escape. This bug fix is the only adjustment.
Welcome to Sound eScape, a coop audio escape room where listening and collaboration the is key to survival!
Here's the brief:
  
You're a spy, one of the best, and stealth is your middle name. You've never failed a mission and you’ve never been caught!   
Until now!
  
Whilst on an infiltration mission in Sonica, you were ambushed and captured by enemy combatants! They locked you in a mysterious warehouse and you have no idea where you are.   
Luckily, your partner back at HQ is ready to help! They have all the possible warehouse locations on their map, and the exit code for each.
  
All you have to do, is tell them where you are.   
Bad news is, the room you’re in has no windows, so you have no clue of what’s behind the door!
  
Good news is, you’re a spy! And your sense of hearing is top notch! Listen to your surroundings and communicate what you hear with your partner to triangulate your position on their map!
  
Oh by the way… did I mention there’s a bomb?!
  
Good luck!   
And don’t mess it up!
  
-HQ

---INSTRUCTIONS---
This game is meant to be shared between two players. One is the captured spy and the other the partner with the map. The spy player must download the game to enter the room. Once inside the room, you can listen to your surroundings for landmarks.
The map holder will use said map to find the location of the spy, based on what the spy hears. When you figure out a location, read the code to the captured spy. They must then input the code into the keypad on the door.
You have one shot at this, otherwise the room explodes!
-----IMPORTANT------

Please download the map PDF from this page!

Please use an external voice chat software like Discord.

-----IMPORTANT------
Please download the map PDF from this page!

Please use an external voice chat software like Discord.

game.title: Doorway Dynamo
game.short_text: A game about picking up doors?!

details.title: Doorway Dynamo
details.description:
Heya! This game was created for Brackey's Game Jam 2024. The theme was "What's behind the door?" This was my first ever Game Jam, and I pretty much did every single dumb thing you could think of. Nevertheless, it was a fun experience and I learned lots of things!

You have the ability to place and pick up (most) doors, there are different types of doors and all of them cannot be placed on dark walls. 
The objective of the game is to find the white gate key to open the gate and escape!
There are currently only 4 playable levels + 2 Tutorial/Testing Levels
Controls:
WASD - Move
E - Interact (Or pick up keys/batteries)
LMB - Place Door
RMB - Pick up Door
F - Use UV Light

Click the bubbles and double click that door!
What is the room next door? that's your goal to figure out! But how? Simple, guess what room you are currently in by the furniture you see! Then, choose what rooms would be next door and ignore those that wouldn't be. But beware, the further you go the trickier it will be!

game.short_text: Will you Sprout or Wither?
game.title: Sprouted

details.title: Sprouted
details.description:
“Your slumber is over, my little sprout. It is time to escape the gaze of the endless doors and make your way back to me…back to us.”






Sprouted is a pixel platformer where you play as Clover, who has just awoken from her prison of stone and is now searching for a way to get out of the endless dungeon. 
While the civilization that has lived down here may be long gone, the dungeon itself is still alive and not too keen on letting you go. 



Navigate the lifeless tunnels of the Dungeons with nothing but a stick!
Try not to get sucked down into deeper levels inside your door-shaped enemies.
Sprout plants throughout the dungeons!
Smash pots. Seriously, you will get to smash so many pots.





Controls


Keyboard
Movement - WSAD
Jump - W
Dash -  L
Attack - K

Controller
movement - joystick
Jump - A
Dash - RT
Attack - X
Tips
Dash direction is decided by movement keys
Destroy hearts to progress
The longer you hold jump button the higher you jump

game.short_text: Game entry with the theme 'What's behind the door?' for Brackey's Game Jam 2024.1
game.title: A musician's lock

details.title: A musician's lock
details.description:
A musician's lock is the entry for the theme 'What's behind the door?' of Brackey's Game Jam 2024.1. Here you play a an adventurer/loved one searching for the legacy of a powerful musician. However his/her belongings are hidden behind a magically locked door.
What will you find? How to open the lock? 
Come find out by playing A musician's lock. Play using a mouse (left click and height information is needed). Left click between the horizontal lines to play a note. 

Have fun and consider rating the game.
Blind people friendly game. Inspired by VAV 'Can I Make a Shooter Game for Blind?'
Can you unlock the game a second time blind?

All assets and scripts where created by me in the time of the jam, except for the menu (which I've created in a previous jam).



  Solutions (Spoiler)
  (counting from bottom to top)
  
    level 1: 1 - 1 - 1
    level 2: 1 - 2 - 3 - 4
    level 3: 1 - 3 - 5 - 7
    level 2: 1 - 3 - 5 - 2 - 4 - 3

WHAT'S BEHIND THE DOOR?
Post-JAM
known issues
[5hrs before release] The boss can run off screen, this is a buffer overflow error where the characters position glitches to a off-screen position.[temp-fix 2hrs before release] because the player is buggy at a higher speed and issuing a MoveTo call, the position is thrown out of whack. Along with the previous bug the collision detection stops working properly.  A fix has been rolled out to at least make the game completable at all times.A fix sadly cannot be made for the current setup without changing the combat system/style.
[+7hrs post release] The original Gameboy has some issues with a palette swap system, blanking the screen in the intro. A patch is being worked on.
patches
[RELEASED | +7hrs post release] Gameboy rom has a issue on DMG-01 and Pocket where palette doesn't load on

game.short_text: In this game show you will have to choose which prizes you find fitting for the contestants to win!
game.title: The Big Backstage Show

details.title: The Big Backstage Show
details.description:
Read before playing:
Loading the WebGL takes some time, but it will load! The game can also be played exclusively with a mouse. If you prefere a faster dialogue speed, you can increase this in the options from the main menu.

And we recommend playing the game in fullscreen, using the Fullscreen button at the bottom right corner. When the WebGL isn't displayed properly on your screen, please download our latest build. (V.1.1.2). 

Work backstage: Choose the prizes!
For players who enjoy having almost everything in their control! Do you like it to be challenged in different ways and love it even more to try again in order to achieve all the secret and possible endings, then this is the game for you. In this game show you will have to choose which prizes you find fitting for the contestants to win! Maybe that sounds rigged? We don't think so, it all depends on the choices you make.
They can only win one prize, so choose wisely. Will it up our audience viewership? Then we celebrate! But maybe you go over budget?! Then our show might go bankrupt! Balance your choice, will you be nice and give all contestants what they want, or will you fling that out the window and go the evil route? The choice is all yours in our The Big Backstage Show!

How to play
- Listen to the wishes of the contestants
- Purchase items from the shop to place behind the doors
- You decide which prize goes behind which door
- Watch the reactions of the contestants after their big reveal
- Bring the show to a success or failure. You decide!

Credits
Tijs de Graaff - Sound Designer
Ires Verkerk - Game Designer
Cynthia Elzing - Artist

Demi Neef - Artist
Bas Rietkerk - Developer
Quincy van der Sluis  - Developer & Designer

Listen to the OST!
Once you’ve downloaded the game, right click the .zip file and click “Extract”.
Open the folder which you extracted the files to
Execute the .exe file and enjoy!

game.short_text: What's behind the door?
game.title: Viginti

details.title: Viginti
details.description:
(Click the door above to play!)
VIGINTI:
You enter a room. Bleary-eyed, exhausted, you focus on what's in front of you.

Doors. More of those infernal doors.

Like the room before this one and the room before that, the doors fill your vision, leering, taunting. Surely, the way out is near. You've come too far to give up now. If only you can get to the next floor...

You fling open door after door, greeted by the denizens of this dark place. Battered and bruised, you finally find a stairway up. At the end, there is another door.
Where does this stairway lead? What's behind the door?
You hold out hope that the answer isn't what you already know it to be...

Overview:
Traverse through 20 floors of a dark dungeon by exploring the doors on each floor.
Doors can contain goodies, such as coins, health, keys, and shops, but they can also contain disturbed souls.
Be warned, as you get closer to your escape, the dungeon grows crueler.

To have any shot at making it out alive, you'll need to collect some relics. With some clever planning and a bit of luck, you should be able to purchase relics from the shops littered throughout the dungeon or find them behind locked doors.

With any luck, you'll manage to escape with your life in tact. Can you ascend all 20 floors of Viginti to the final door? What secrets lie in wait?



Created with Excaliburjs by: farkAtDark
Unfortunately, I couldn't get my font resources loaded properly into the web-build of the game. Please see the Github repository for instructions on how to run the game with the font and for more detailed info about the game: https://github.com/ParkerZ/brackeysDoorGame

game.short_text: Try to find the EXIT!
game.title: One Door To Escape

details.title: One Door To Escape
details.description:
Name: One Door To Escape (game for the Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1.)
Setting:Medieval fantasy
Story:You need to find a way out. The exit is hidden in 1 of 100 doors. You have to open door after door and ask the main question, "What's behind the door?" Be careful, not all doors are safe... Sometimes you will have to fight, and sometimes you will have to complete an "unfair" task... Be strong and find your EXIT!
Rules:When you start the game, a field with 100 doors will open in front of you. Don't be afraid... You need to open each door in turn. One of the 100 doors leads to the EXIT, your goal is to find it! At other doors you will encounter enemies or quests. If you lose a battle or fail to complete a task, you will lose 1 Health Points.
Lose ALL HP = DEATH!
 If you win in the room you will receive a reward: Gold, Ability or Items.Gold - needed in the store and some other rooms.Ability - cost 1 Mana Points and are used before entering the room.Items - are mostly passive, but there are some that can be used in the room.
All control using mouse and LMB
GOOD LUCK! And find the EXIT!  You can't escape!
-----

Additional assets used:Brackeys Free 2D Mega PackBlackspire Medieval pixel art asset FREE 
Music:We Three Celtic Kings by Alexander Nakarada (CreatorChords) | Music promoted by https://www.free-stock-music.comCreative Commons / Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
Sounds:https://sfxr.me/
P.s. This is my first time participating in a game jam alone. I'm a game designer and I program a little in Unity BOLT.

game.short_text: Whats the wurst that can happen?
game.title: Mama Wurst

details.title: Mama Wurst
details.description:
Whats the wurst that can happen?
Step into the shoes of a surveillance operative at Mama's Wurst, a fast food empire, filled with dirty corporate drama. Follow three characters over a week, gathering clues and exposing obfuscations. Interact with the environment and connect the dots between unique storylines, but be careful! Manage your interactions wisely, while saving the most important information. Shape your own unique storyline and unveil the secrets behind the golden arches of Mamas Wurst in “What's the wurst that can happen”.


This project was created as part of the Brackey Game Jam in February 2024, with a development duration of seven days. Contributing to the project were Anita Franz (Character & Environment Design), Celine Heublein (UI Design), Lisa Zehnder (Programmer), Marvin Braun (Programmer), and Maxim Lefrank (Narrativ & Sound Design).

game.title: Meiro De Maigo 2
game.short_text: Embark on 'Meiro De Maigo' – navigate, outsmart monsters, and sacrifice for success! 🌟

details.title: Meiro De Maigo 2
details.description:
🌟 Welcome to the thrilling adventure of "Meiro De Maigo"! Embark on a journey through intricately generated mazes where the pursuit of treasure is met with the challenge of evading cunning monsters in every room. Your mission is clear – find the path to the treasure room, but be wary of the monsters that lurk in the shadows, determined to thwart your progress.

🔍 In "Meiro De Maigo," every room presents a new challenge. Uncover the monsters hidden within each chamber, and outsmart them to reach the coveted treasure room. The path won't be easy, and you might face adversity along the way.

💀 Fear not, intrepid adventurer! "Meiro De Maigo" offers a unique twist to the journey. Should you meet an untimely demise, you have the power to sacrifice a portion of yourself – whether it's your life force, your attack strength, or your healing abilities – to revive and take another shot at conquering the maze. The challenge is formidable, but the rewards are great for those who dare to face the monsters and navigate the labyrinth.

👁️‍🗨️ Are you ready to test your wits, make sacrifices, and emerge victorious in the mysterious and perilous world of "Meiro De Maigo"? The maze awaits, and the treasure room beckons – are you up for the challenge?

🧸 This game was build using my own game engine 🧸 Tiny, in one week (Levels, sound, sprites...). Try 🧸 Tiny online before using it for your next project 😏 !
🎮 (How to play? Pick your choice with arrows and validate your choice with space)💬 You like the game? Feel free to add a comment below ⤵️

game.short_text: We're going where we don't need doormats!
game.title: Spider in Doorija

details.title: Spider in Doorija
details.description:
Updates:- Main soundtrack continues playing at end screen instead of start screen soundtrack.
IMPORTANT: The game may be laggy in full screen mode.
You would think that after making over 12 jam games I would learn to not overscope and attempt to do an idea that I couldn't reasonably do alone in such a short time period.

Well you wrong.
Introducing: Spider in Doorija!
Play as a little chicken looking duded named Spider in this platformer! You have been teleported to another weirdly door themed dimension and you must get back to your family. Use A and D (or arrow keys) to move and Spacebar(or W) to jump! Every level (all 3 of them) are jam packed to the brim with random mechanics and stuff I added last minute! Evade dangerous spikes, listen to some music I spent almost an entire day working on, and get home!
Before the jam started I decided that for a change I would not do a pixel art game. And it was way harder than I expected. Like way way harder. Way way way harder.

Way way way way way way harder.

But I'm glad I did it anyways! I'll probably go back to pixel art  after this but I do want to try different art styles every once in a while.
Made in 5 days for the Brackeys Game Jam 2024.1 with the theme "What's behind the door?"
Enjoy!

FAQ:
Q: how I move?
A: use A and D keys or Arrow Keys to run; along with Spacebar, W and up arrow key to jump.
Q: why is the place named Doorija
A: you don't want to know how long I just walked around trying to think of a place name so yeah in the end Doorija won.
